name: Warden
description: Warden is building the Global Agent Network, an infrastructure and application stack that allows anyone to interact with crypto through intelligent agents. At its core is the Warden App, used by over 8 million users to swap tokens, manage wallets, bridge assets, access data, and interact with dApps, all by simply asking agents to do it. Behind the scenes, Warden Protocol allows developers to create verifiable, composable agents with support for AI inference, onchain identity, and cross-chain execution. It’s the agentic layer for the next era of crypto, where users don’t click through dApps, they just ask.
